issue_summary: Forbid empty ranges in ImmutableRangeMap.Builder. Created by MOE: http://code.google.com/p/moe-java MOE_MIGRATED_REVID=37065199
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Associates the specified range with the specified value.
     *
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if {@code range} overlaps with any other ranges inserted
     *         into this builder
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Associates the specified range with the specified value.
     *
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if {@code range} overlaps with any other ranges inserted
     *         into this builder, or if {@code range} is empty
     */
